title: E2E for supported device page and color theme flow
scenario: E2E test covering welcome page, EULA, guest flow, PPIP, location permission, onboarding, device selection, color theme, and About page navigation in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the Welcome page and verify all expected UI elements are displayed.
3. Accept the EULA (End User License Agreement).
4. Tap 'Continue as Guest' to proceed without signing in.
5. Dismiss or accept the PPIP (Personal Privacy Information Protection) dialog if shown.
6. Grant location permission when prompted (allow or deny as per test scenario).
7. Navigate through the onboarding screens (swipe or tap Next until completed).
8. On the Device Selection page, verify the list of supported devices is displayed.
9. If a device is available, connect to it; otherwise skip device connection.
10. From the Home screen, tap the Main Menu (hamburger icon or three-dot menu).
11. Tap 'Color Theme' from the menu and verify the Color Theme page opens.
12. Navigate back from the Color Theme page to the Home screen.
13. Open the Main Menu again and tap 'About' to access the About page.
14. Verify the About page content is displayed correctly.
15. Navigate back from the About page to the Home screen.
16. Verify that back navigation works correctly at each step throughout the flow.
expected: All screens display correctly: Welcome page elements are present, EULA acceptance proceeds, 'Continue as Guest' flow works, PPIP dialog is handled, location permission prompt appears, onboarding screens transition properly, device selection page lists supported devices, Color Theme page is accessible from the main menu, About page content is correct, and back navigation returns to the previous screen at each step without errors or crashes.
